segments.text: Juggling situation, and the ledge is right there!
segments.original_text: 着地狩りの展開、崖もついてきて

segments.text: Tessamus won't take it lying down
segments.original_text: テシサムス、タダではやられない

segments.text: Backing off for an aerial grab, forcing the shield!
segments.original_text: 引いて空グラ、シールド強要
だがここで、つかしのゴール

full_text: Juggling situation, and the ledge is right there! Get that fair out! Tessamus won't take it lying down Not giving up the turn Backing off for an aerial grab, forcing the shield! But there's the finish!

corrections.rule: aerial grapple beam, Samus's aerial grab
